overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit commercial district at dusk. The character moves along sidewalks past holographic billboards and glass buildings, approaching a prominent tower with a glowing 'CALIENTE' sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial storefronts and the large DYNALAR billboard

entered.detail: large holographic advertisement displaying 'DYNALAR' text on the left building facade
various illuminated commercial signs and awnings along the sidewalk
multi-story modern building with reflective glass facade and neon accents on the right side of the street
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic commercial sidewalk at dusk, passing by the prominent DYNALAR billboard on the left and various neon storefront signs. Futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane road to the right, while sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with green neon lighting

events.description: moving under building awnings where green neon lighting becomes the dominant light source
turning slightly right to reveal the CALIENTE tower ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway under covered awnings with green neon lights, approaching the open plaza

entered.detail: overhead building awning illuminated with green neon strip lighting
tall building with large orange 'CALIENTE' signage at the top, visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves under a covered walkway illuminated by green neon lights, transitioning from the open street to a more sheltered environment. The CALIENTE tower becomes visible in the distance ahead as the character continues walking forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching the Caliente tower

events.description: pedestrian density increases as the character enters the plaza area near the CALIENTE building

agents.ego_description: walking toward the CALIENTE building through a pedestrian plaza with increasing crowd density

notable_agents.action: woman in light blue top and patterned pants walking past the camera from left to right

entered.detail: commercial building with illuminated 'softsys' signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open plaza and approaches the CALIENTE tower, which dominates the center of the frame. The pedestrian density increases with people walking in various directions, and the character passes by the softsys building on the left while the CALIENTE tower grows larger in the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from an open street into a sheltered walkway and finally into a bustling urban plaza. It begins with the character walking along a futuristic sidewalk at dusk, passing a prominent DYNALAR billboard and neon storefronts while vehicles stream along the adjacent road. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered walkway illuminated by green neon lights, narrowing the view before the CALIENTE tower emerges in the distance. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the shelter into an open plaza, passing the softsys building on the left. Finally, the environment opens up as pedestrian density increases and the towering CALIENTE sign grows to dominate the center of the frame.
